top_trades.reason: Massive $3.4M premium on deeply ITM puts 111% below current price suggests either a complex spread or extreme bearish protection on Micron. The tight bid-ask spread ($3 on a $474 option) and large size indicate institutional sophistication, possibly hedging significant long equity exposure or anticipating semiconductor sector collapse.

The $59K+ per contract premium and relatively wide $6.25 spread suggests this is likely part of a portfolio hedge against severe tech selloff through March 2026.

Deep ITM TSLA put buying at 109% below current price represents $2.7M in premium, signaling either delta-one replication or catastrophic bearish positioning. With TSLA at $391 and strike at $820, this appears to be capturing intrinsic value in a structured trade, possibly unwinding long exposure or expressing conviction of continued weakness.

Nearly $4M SPY put purchase 34% ITM with strikes at 885 represents significant market hedging or bearish conviction through March 2026.
